SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVARRO, RICARDO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
